## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration opportunities between Sara Lattanzio and Marcel Santilli's company, GrowthX.ai.](https://fathom.video/share/EESRx4NyXQNYf_2xqGFL-yx6ZwzVzwny?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Sara is transitioning from her current role and open to new opportunities, including potential collaboration with GrowthX.ai](https://fathom.video/share/EESRx4NyXQNYf_2xqGFL-yx6ZwzVzwny?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [GrowthX.ai is expanding its services, including community building, newsletters, and social media strategies for clients](https://fathom.video/share/EESRx4NyXQNYf_2xqGFL-yx6ZwzVzwny?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
  - [Both parties share an interest in educating people about AI and its practical applications in marketing and content creation](https://fathom.video/share/EESRx4NyXQNYf_2xqGFL-yx6ZwzVzwny?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [There's mutual interest in finding ways to work together, leveraging Sara's audience and content creation skills](https://fathom.video/share/EESRx4NyXQNYf_2xqGFL-yx6ZwzVzwny?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)

## Topics

### Sara's Background and Current Situation

  - [Based in Zürich, Switzerland with 10 years of B2B experience](https://fathom.video/share/EESRx4NyXQNYf_2xqGFL-yx6ZwzVzwny?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
  - [Built a significant LinkedIn audience (30,000+ followers) over the past 4 years](https://fathom.video/share/EESRx4NyXQNYf_2xqGFL-yx6ZwzVzwny?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
  - [Finishing tenure as head of marketing at a venture building company](https://fathom.video/share/EESRx4NyXQNYf_2xqGFL-yx6ZwzVzwny?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
  - [Launching a newsletter focused on AI with a fact-based, educational approach](https://fathom.video/share/EESRx4NyXQNYf_2xqGFL-yx6ZwzVzwny?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)

### GrowthX.ai's Current Initiatives

  - [Expanding services beyond content creation to include newsletters and social media strategies for clients](https://fathom.video/share/EESRx4NyXQNYf_2xqGFL-yx6ZwzVzwny?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
  - [Launching a community platform (ailedgrowth.com) with plans for paid memberships and valuable content](https://fathom.video/share/EESRx4NyXQNYf_2xqGFL-yx6ZwzVzwny?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
  - [Starting a podcast and considering rebranding efforts around "AI-led growth"](https://fathom.video/share/EESRx4NyXQNYf_2xqGFL-yx6ZwzVzwny?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
  - [Developing tools for LLM visibility and content editing to compete with other players in the market](https://fathom.video/share/EESRx4NyXQNYf_2xqGFL-yx6ZwzVzwny?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)

### Potential Collaboration Areas

  - [Sara could potentially help as an "evangelist" for GrowthX.ai, educating people about AI in marketing](https://fathom.video/share/EESRx4NyXQNYf_2xqGFL-yx6ZwzVzwny?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
  - [Opportunities for paid collaborations in the short term while exploring longer-term possibilities](https://fathom.video/share/EESRx4NyXQNYf_2xqGFL-yx6ZwzVzwny?tab=summary&timestamp=1552.0)
  - [GrowthX.ai interested in leveraging Sara's audience-building and content creation expertise](https://fathom.video/share/EESRx4NyXQNYf_2xqGFL-yx6ZwzVzwny?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)
  - [Possible involvement in community management or content creation for GrowthX.ai's initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/EESRx4NyXQNYf_2xqGFL-yx6ZwzVzwny?tab=summary&timestamp=1637.0)

### Shared Values and Approach

  - [Both emphasize the importance of creating genuine value and building communities](https://fathom.video/share/EESRx4NyXQNYf_2xqGFL-yx6ZwzVzwny?tab=summary&timestamp=1753.0)
  - [Focus on educating about AI's practical applications and debunking misconceptions](https://fathom.video/share/EESRx4NyXQNYf_2xqGFL-yx6ZwzVzwny?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [Interest in transparent, ethical approaches to marketing and audience building](https://fathom.video/share/EESRx4NyXQNYf_2xqGFL-yx6ZwzVzwny?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to introduce Sara to Jason, VP of Go-to-Market at GrowthX.ai](https://fathom.video/share/EESRx4NyXQNYf_2xqGFL-yx6ZwzVzwny?tab=summary&timestamp=1609.0)
  - [Explore short-term paid collaboration opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/EESRx4NyXQNYf_2xqGFL-yx6ZwzVzwny?tab=summary&timestamp=1552.0)
  - [Continue discussions to identify specific roles or projects for potential long-term engagement](https://fathom.video/share/EESRx4NyXQNYf_2xqGFL-yx6ZwzVzwny?tab=summary&timestamp=1637.0)
  - [Sara available for more intensive involvement after mid-September](https://fathom.video/share/EESRx4NyXQNYf_2xqGFL-yx6ZwzVzwny?tab=summary&timestamp=1542.0)
